option.value:
spring.application.name=jet2holiday
# Connection spring.datasource.url=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/portfolio_app_db spring.datasource.username=root spring.datasource.password=931207
# Schema generation spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update
# Hibernate extras spring.jpa.database-platform=org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLDialect spring.jpa.show-sql=true spring.jpa.properties.hibernate.format_sql=true

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
spring.application.name=jet2holiday
# Connection spring.datasource.url=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/portfolio_app_db spring.datasource.username=root spring.datasource.password=931207
# Schema generation spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update
# Hibernate extras spring.jpa.database-platform=org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLDialect spring.jpa.show-sql=true spring.jpa.properties.hibernate.format_sql=true
# LLM advice integration (OpenAI-compatible chat completions API) llm.enabled=${LLM_ENABLED:false} llm.api.endpoint=${LLM_API_ENDPOINT:https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions} llm.api.key=${LLM_API_KEY:} llm.api.model=${LLM_API_MODEL:gpt-4o-mini} llm.api.timeout-ms=${LLM_API_TIMEOUT_MS:12000}

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
